reviews.review_msg: I'm still trying to figure out how she marks things. It's totally arbitrary. The amount of work for this class was a bit ridiculous for a third year class, especially since we got the marking criteria for one assignment the day it was due. Plays favourites (2/68 students get full participation marks? Come on). Not horrible, but not outstanding.

I only read one of the assigned books, as most assignments (including the term paper) - aside from a critical review on a reading of your choice - have NOTHING to do with the course. They are totally supplementary. She's super picky about the mechanics of writing so she's a hard marker. Aside from that I thoroughly enjoyed the course.

She's a nice person but I didn't find this class helpful at all. Lectures frequently ran off topic and the reading list seemed totally supplementary. I didn't even bother to read the last 3. Her marking scheme is useless as well. She offers only grammatical corrections and no real feedback to help you with on your paper. I'll be avoiding her.

She knows her stuff. Lectures are engaging. However, kind of condescending and rude. She has her 'favorites' in the class. Questionable marking scheme. No final exam for the course, though, and for me that's a plus. I'm on the fence with her, but I wouldn't discourage you from taking the course because you will learn a lot.

Great prof. Comes across as a bit of dragon lady at first, but this is a ruse... she's a sweetheart. Go to her office hours and chat with her, find a paper topic that really interests you, and then run with it. She's perpetually disorganized, and can't figure out the AV stuff for love or money, but she's fantastic. Really first rate.

Karyn is a spectacular professor! She runs an interesting class with ample time for discussion. Yes, she gives writing assessments and flexible due dates. Firstly, its 3rd year, you should be able to do them no sweat. Secondly, she assigns them to HELP you do better on your Term paper. She gives ample opportunity to get top marks. Excellent prof!

I learned so much from this class--this is one of the few profs who has helpful, useful feedback on improvement. My writing is much more coherent and correct because of this class.  Great discussions, great textual information, wonderful flexibility with interests and assignments. Yes, she doesn't baby you through the course--you're in 3rd year.
I found this prof to be very rude, unhelpful and generally unknowledgeable. It's a shame when professors think they are so much better than their students and peers.

A lot of WebCT. A ridiculous amount of biographical information on authors. Little to no engaging textual analysis. Talks the class away with her favourite students about things that have no bearing on the course at all. Unclear assignment guidelines. You end up paying for her disorganization with your grade.
Karyn is a very smart and engaging prof; however, she is very very picky about the mechanics of writing.. very picky..
